name: UI Shader
overview:
The icon displayed in the class selection menu and on the scoreboard.

**Format**
`gfx/menus/classes/icon_name`

**Finding Icons**
*   Browse `mbii-holocron/FA_Assets/icons/`
*   Use the **Asset Browser** in the FA Creator to find `.jpg` or `.tga` files in `gfx/menus/`.
description: The icon displayed in the class selection menu and on the scoreboard.

name: Model
overview:
The 3D character model used in-game.

**Format**
`model_name`

**Examples**
*   `jedi_hm` (Human Male Jedi)
*   `clonetrooper` (Clone Trooper)
*   `cultist` (Sith Cultist)
tips: Must correspond to a folder in `models/players/`.
Use the **Asset Browser** or **Preview** button to verify.
description: The 3D character model used in-game.

name: Skin
overview:
The texture set applied to the model.

**Format**
`skin_name` (e.g., `default`, `red`, `blue`, `rgb`)
tips: Must exist within the model's `.skin` files.
`default` is the most common.
`rgb` allows for custom colors if the model supports it.
description: The texture set applied to the model.

name: Class Flags
overview: Special modifiers that alter the fundamental behavior of a character class.
tips: Select flags from the list to enable unique mechanics like "No Locational Damage" or "Acid Blood".
Combine multiple flags for custom boss characters.
description: Special modifiers that alter the fundamental behavior of a character class.

name: Soundset
overview:
The voice lines and sounds the character makes.

**Format**
`sound_folder`

**Examples**
*   `jedi1`
*   `clonetrooper`
*   `kyle`
tips: Must correspond to a folder in `sound/chars/`.
description: The voice lines and sounds the character makes.

name: 🔢 MB Points
overview:
The total points available for a Custom Build character to spend.
> **Default:** 0

**⚙️ Mechanics**
*   **Pool:** The budget the player has to buy ranks in `c_att_skill_*`.
tips: Standard Legends value: ~100-150 depending on power level.
description: The total points available for a Custom Build character to spend.

name: ❤️ Max Health
overview:
Sets the character's base maximum HP.
> **Default:** Varies by class (Soldier: 100, Wookiee: 400+, etc.)
tips: This is the "naked" HP before any `MB_ATT_HEALTH` or `MB_ATT_WOOKIE_HEALTH` bonuses are applied.
For **SBDs** and **Droidekas**, this is their Hull integrity.
description: Sets the character's base maximum HP.

name: 🔫 Rate of Fire
overview:
Multiplier for weapon firing speed.
> **Default:** 1.0 (Normal Speed)

**⚙️ Mechanics**
*   **Lower is Faster:** Values < 1.0 increase fire rate (e.g., 0.8 = 20% faster).
*   **Higher is Slower:** Values > 1.0 decrease fire rate (e.g., 2.0 = half speed).
tips: Careful with low values; can make weapons overpowered instantly.
description: Multiplier for weapon firing speed.

name: 🛠️ Custom Build
overview:
Enables the Point Buy system for this character.
> **Default:** 0 (Disabled)

**⚙️ Mechanics**
*   **1 (Enabled):** The character starts with a pool of `mbPoints` and must purchase attributes/weapons in the UI.
*   **0 (Disabled):** The character spawns with the preset `attributes` and `weapons` defined in the file.
tips: Required for "Legends" style configurable classes.
description: Enables the Point Buy system for this character.

name: 🏃 Base Speed
overview:
Sets a fixed movement speed value, overriding class defaults.
> **Default:** -1 (Use class default)

**⚙️ Mechanics**
*   **Value:** Raw engine units (e.g., 250 = Hero speed).
*   **Override:** Ignores the `speed` multiplier field if set.
tips: Use this if you want a specific speed regardless of what class the character is based on.
description: Sets a fixed movement speed value, overriding class defaults.

name: 🛡️ Max Armor
overview:
Sets the character's base maximum Armor.
> **Default:** 0
tips: This is the base armor value.
Use `MB_ATT_ARMOUR` to define the *quality* (light/medium/heavy) and effectiveness of this armor.
Without `MB_ATT_ARMOUR` (or Cortosis/Blast Armor), this armor offers basic protection.
description: Sets the character's base maximum Armor.

name: 📐 Model Scale
overview:
Scales the size of the player model and hitbox.
> **Default:** 1.0

**⚙️ Mechanics**
*   **< 1.0:** Smaller (e.g., Yoda = ~0.6-0.7). Harder to hit, can fit in small vents.
*   **> 1.0:** Larger (e.g., Desann = ~1.12). Easier to hit, longer reach.
tips: Overrides class defaults (like Wookiee/SBD scaling).
Not currently compatible with Droidekas.
description: Scales the size of the player model and hitbox.

name: 🏃 Speed Multiplier
overview:
Multiplies the class's default movement speed.
> **Default:** 1.0

**⚙️ Mechanics**
*   **1.0:** Normal class speed.
*   **1.1:** 10% Faster.
*   **0.9:** 10% Slower.
tips: Jedi Base: ~250?
Soldier Base: ~200?
Use `baseSpeed` for absolute control, `speed` for relative scaling.
description: Multiplies the class's default movement speed.

name: ⚔️ Saber Damage
overview:
Forces a flat damage value for all lightsaber styles.
> **Default:** -1 (Use .sab file values)

**⚙️ Mechanics**
*   **Value:** Integer damage per hit.
*   **Override:** Overrides .sab file damage, but NOT `damageGiven` multiplier.
*   **Healing:** Negative values can heal targets (Experimental).
tips: Useful for standardizing damage across different styles without editing .sab files.
description: Forces a flat damage value for all lightsaber styles.

name: 🛡️ Armor Regen
overview:
Passive Armor regeneration.

**⚙️ Mechanics**
*   **Amount:** How much Armor to restore per tick.
*   **Rate:** Time in ms between ticks.
tips: Simulates recharging shields (Halo/Halo style).
Great for Droids or Master Chiefs.
description: Passive Armor regeneration.

name: ❤️ Extra Lives
overview:
Number of times the player can respawn.
> **Default:** 0 (1 Life total).

**⚙️ Mechanics**
*   **Value:** Number of *respawns* (not total lives).
*   **1:** You play, die, respawn once. (2 Lives total).
*   **4:** Standard Soldier count (5 Lives total).
tips: **Soldiers:** Typically 2-4 extra lives.
**Jedi/Sith/Heroes:** Typically 0 extra lives.
description: Number of times the player can respawn.

name: 🎨 User RGB
overview:
Enables custom color selection for the model's shader.
> **Default:** 0 (Disabled).

**⚙️ Mechanics**
*   **1 (True):** Enables `customred`, `customgreen`, `customblue` fields.
*   **Requirement:** The model/skin must support RGB tinting (usually has a `_rgb` suffix).
tips: Allows for "Custom" clone battalions or lightsaber colors on armor.
description: Enables custom color selection for the model's shader.

name: 🔢 Rank Health
overview:
Defines the Health values for Point Buy ranks.
> **Format:** `rank1,rank2,rank3` (e.g., `100,120,150`)

**⚙️ Mechanics**
*   **Rank 1:** Health value when purchasing the first level of `MB_ATT_HEALTH` (or custom equivalent).
*   **Rank 2/3:** Subsequent levels.
tips: Overrides standard `+X` logic if used in a Custom Build.
description: Defines the Health values for Point Buy ranks.

name: 🗿 Knockback Taken
overview:
Multiplier for how far YOU fly when hit by explosives or Push.
> **Default:** 1.0

**⚙️ Mechanics**
*   **0.0:** **Immovable Object**.
*   **0.5:** "Heavy" feel. Hard to push off ledges.
*   **1.5:** "Light" feel. Easily ragdolled.
tips: **Droidekas** and **SBDs** usually have low values (0.5 - 0.8) to simulate weight.
description: Multiplier for how far YOU fly when hit by explosives or Push.

name: 🔵 Custom Blue
overview:
Blue component of the custom color.
> **Range:** 0.0 to 1.0
tips: `1.0` = Max Blue.
description: Blue component of the custom color.

name: 🟢 Custom Green
overview:
Green component of the custom color.
> **Range:** 0.0 to 1.0
tips: `1.0` = Max Green.
description: Green component of the custom color.

name: 💥 Damage Given Multiplier
overview:
Global damage output multiplier for this character.
> **Default:** 1.0 (100%)

**⚙️ Mechanics**
*   **1.0:** Normal Damage.
*   **0.8:** 80% Damage (20% reduction).
*   **1.2:** 120% Damage (20% bonus).
tips: **0.8** is common for classes with high fire rate or spam potential.
**1.2+** is used for "Glass Cannons" or Bosses.
description: Global damage output multiplier for this character.

name: ⏳ Respawn Time
overview:
Sets a custom respawn timer for this specific class.
> **Default:** 0 (Uses gametype default, usually 10-20s).

**⚙️ Mechanics**
*   **Value:** Milliseconds (e.g., `10000` = 10s).
*   **Effect:** Overrides the server's wave spawn timer for this class.
tips: Use for "fodder" classes (Soldiers) to let them spawn faster (`5000` ms).
Use for elite classes to punish death (`30000` ms).
description: Sets a custom respawn timer for this specific class.

name: 🔢 Class Limit
overview:
Restricts how many players can pick this class simultaneously.
> **Default:** -1 (Unlimited).

**⚙️ Mechanics**
*   **Value:** Integer count.
*   **Effect:** Once the limit is reached, the class icon grays out for other players.
tips: **1:** Unique Hero/Boss (Luke, Vader).
**2-3:** Elite units (ARC Troopers, Droidekas).
description: Restricts how many players can pick this class simultaneously.

name: 🖼️ UI Overlay
overview:
Displays a custom image overlay on the class portrait.

**⚙️ Mechanics**
*   **Value:** Path to shader/image.
*   **Usage:** Often used to show rank insignias (Commander stars, Sergeant stripes) over the base icon.
tips: Example: `gfx/icons/infantry`
description: Displays a custom image overlay on the class portrait.

name: 💨 Knockback Given
overview:
Multiplier for how far this character sends enemies flying.
> **Default:** 1.0

**⚙️ Mechanics**
*   **> 1.0:** Your explosions/punches send enemies further.
*   **< 1.0:** Your attacks barely move enemies.
tips: **Wookiees** and **SBDs** often have high `knockbackGiven` on melee.
description: Multiplier for how far this character sends enemies flying.

name: ❤️ Health Regen
overview:
Passive HP regeneration.

**⚙️ Mechanics**
*   **Amount:** How much HP to restore per tick (e.g., `1`, `5`).
*   **Rate:** How often to tick in milliseconds (e.g., `1000` = 1 second).
tips: **Bosses:** Give them `1` HP every `1000` ms for slow, steady recovery.
**Trolls:** Give them `100` HP every `500` ms for near-invincibility (not recommended).
description: Passive HP regeneration.

name: 🛡️ Rank Armor
overview:
Defines the Armor values for Point Buy ranks.
> **Format:** `rank1,rank2,rank3` (e.g., `50,100,150`)

**⚙️ Mechanics**
*   Sets the exact Armor value per purchased rank.
tips: Useful for classes where you want Armor upgrades to be massive (e.g. SBD plating).
description: Defines the Armor values for Point Buy ranks.

name: 🛡️ Damage Taken Multiplier
overview:
Global damage resistance multiplier.
> **Default:** 1.0 (100% / No resistance)

**⚙️ Mechanics**
*   **1.0:** Takes normal damage.
*   **0.5:** Takes 50% damage (Half damage).
*   **0.9:** Takes 90% damage (10% resistance - Standard Jedi trait).
tips: **Jedi/Sith** usually have **0.9** (10% innate reduction).
**Wookiees** often use `0.85` or `0.9` to simulate toughness.
description: Global damage resistance multiplier.

name: 🔴 Custom Red
overview:
Red component of the custom color.
> **Range:** 0.0 to 1.0
tips: `1.0` = Max Red.
`0.0` = No Red.
description: Red component of the custom color.

name: 👐 Disarm Bonus
overview:
Modifies the chance to disarm an opponent's saber.
> **Default:** 0

**⚙️ Mechanics**
*   **Value:** Integer.
*   **Effect:** A positive value increases the likelihood of knocking the saber out of an opponent's hand, especially when their Block Points are low or on specific "Disarm" moves.
tips: Used for highly skilled "Swordmaster" characters.
description: Modifies the chance to disarm an opponent's saber.

name: 💥 Break Parry Bonus
overview:
Increases the chance to smash through an opponent's parry/block.
> **Default:** 0

**⚙️ Mechanics**
*   **Value:** Integer.
*   **Effect:** Increases BP damage dealt to a blocking opponent.
tips: Essential for "Guard Breaker" builds.
description: Increases the chance to smash through an opponent's parry/block.

name: 🚀 Knockback Scale
overview:
Multiplier for force applied to enemies on hit.
> **Default:** 0.0 (Uses standard physics)

**⚙️ Mechanics**
*   **Higher values:** Send enemies flying further on hit.
*   **Baseball Bat:** Set to **5.0+** for comical knockback effects.
tips: Combined with low damage (`damageScale 0.1`), creates a "CC" weapon.
description: Multiplier for force applied to enemies on hit.

name: 🚥 Trail Style
overview:
Changes the visual trail left by the lightsaber blade.
> **Default:** 0 (Standard Blur)

**📊 Values**
*   **0:** Standard Motion Blur.
*   **1:** Solid Ribbon.
*   **2:** Sparkles/Particles (Unstable blade effect).
tips: Use **2** for Kylo Ren style "crackle" blades.
description: Changes the visual trail left by the lightsaber blade.

name: 📐 Saber Length
overview:
The physical length of the blade in game units.
> **Default:** 32.0

**📊 Common Values**
*   **32.0:** Standard one-handed hilt.
*   **40.0:** Long blade (Desann/Galak style). Good for reach, bad for close quarters (wall hits).
*   **24.0:** Shoto / Short blade (Yoda style). Fast, low reach.
tips: Does not affect damage directly, but affects **reach** which is critical in duels.
description: The physical length of the blade in game units.

name: 🎵 Sound Loop
overview:
The continuous hum of the idle lightsaber.
> **Example:** `"sound/weapons/saber/saberhum4.wav"`
tips: Must be a seamless loop.
Crucial for the "feel" of the saber (menacing vs calm).
description: The continuous hum of the idle lightsaber.

name: ⚔️ Slap Animation
overview:
Overrides the animation used when performing a "Slap" (or Kick with saber).
> **Default:** `BOTH_KICK_RL_LEG` (Standard Kick)

**⚙️ Mechanics**
*   **Value:** Enum string from `animation.cfg`.
*   **Usage:** Used for custom melee attacks on specialized sabers (e.g. hitting with the hilt).
tips: `BOTH_PUNCH1` makes it look like a punch.
`BOTH_PUSH1` makes it look like a Force Push gesture.
description: Overrides the animation used when performing a "Slap" (or Kick with saber).

name: 🎵 Swing Sounds
overview:
Sounds played when the saber is swung.
> **Example:** `"sound/weapons/saber/saberhup1.wav"`
tips: Define all three for variety.
Heavy weapons should have deeper "whoosh" sounds.
description: Sounds played when the saber is swung.

name: ⚔️ Jump Attack (Up)
overview:
Overrides the animation for the "Death From Above" or upward jump attack.
> **Default:** `LS_JUMPATTACK_DUAL` (or style dependent).

**⚙️ Mechanics**
*   **Value:** Enum string.
*   **Gameplay:** Changes the hitbox timing and visual of the aerial attack.
tips: Use `LS_A_FLIP_STAB` for a downward stab motion.
description: Overrides the animation for the "Death From Above" or upward jump attack.

name: ⚔️ Lunge Attack
overview:
Overrides the animation for the forward lunge attack (Crouch + Forward + Attack).
> **Default:** `LS_LUNGE`

**⚙️ Mechanics**
*   **Value:** Enum string.
*   **Gameplay:** Can change a stab into a slash or spin.
tips: `LS_STAFF_SOULCAL` creates a unique spinning lunge.
description: Overrides the animation for the forward lunge attack (Crouch + Forward + Attack).

name: 🚫 No Wall Marks
overview:
Prevents the saber from leaving burn marks on architecture.

**⚙️ Mechanics**
*   **1 (True):** No molten slash marks on walls/floors.
*   **0 (False):** Standard behavior.
tips: Useful for "physical" swords (Vibroblades, Beskads) that aren't superheated plasma.
description: Prevents the saber from leaving burn marks on architecture.

name: 🚫 No Dlight (Dynamic Light)
overview:
Prevents the saber from casting light on the environment.

**⚙️ Mechanics**
*   **1 (True):** Blade does not glow/illuminate surroundings.
*   **0 (False):** Blade casts light matching its color.
tips: Essential for metallic weapons (Swords, Axes, Clubs) so they don't look like glowsticks.
description: Prevents the saber from casting light on the environment.

name: ⚔️ Anim Speed Scale (Saber)
overview:
Multiplies the animation speed of this saber's attacks.
> **Default:** 1.0

**⚙️ Mechanics**
*   **1.0:** Normal animation speed.
*   **1.1:** +10% Faster animations.
*   **0.9:** -10% Slower animations.
tips: Can make an otherwise slow saber style feel much faster, or a fast one feel sluggish.
description: Multiplies the animation speed of this saber's attacks.

name: 🎵 Block Sounds
overview:
Sounds played when blocking another saber.
> **Example:** `"sound/weapons/saber/saberblock1.wav"`
tips: The clash of plasma!
description: Sounds played when blocking another saber.

name: 🎵 Bounce Sounds
overview:
Sounds played when the saber hits a wall/floor.
> **Example:** `"sound/weapons/saber/saberbounce1.wav"`
tips: Used if `bounceOnWalls` is enabled.
description: Sounds played when the saber hits a wall/floor.

name: 🎾 Bounce on Walls
overview:
Saber bounces off architecture instead of sliding.

**⚙️ Mechanics**
*   **1 (True):** Hitting a wall stops the swing and plays a bounce animation/sound.
*   **0 (False):** Saber slides along the wall (Molten cutting effect).
tips: Recommended for physical weapons (Batons, Staves) that cannot cut through durasteel.
description: Saber bounces off architecture instead of sliding.

name: ⚔️ Max Chain
overview:
Defines the maximum number of consecutive lightsaber swings in a combo.
> **Default:** Varies by saber style (typically 3-5).

**⚙️ Mechanics**
*   **Value:** Integer (e.g., `3`, `5`, `10`).
*   **Effect:** A higher value allows for longer, more fluid offensive sequences.
*   **Relation:** `MB_ATT_SABER_MAXCHAIN` attribute can override this.
tips: A value of `0` or `1` often indicates a very slow, heavy-hitting style or a physical weapon.
description: Defines the maximum number of consecutive lightsaber swings in a combo.

name: 🏃 Move Speed Scale (Saber)
overview:
Multiplies the player's movement speed while this saber is equipped.
> **Default:** 1.0

**⚙️ Mechanics**
*   **1.0:** No change.
*   **1.1:** +10% Speed.
*   **0.9:** -10% Speed.
tips: Useful for custom lightsabers that are unusually heavy (`0.8`) or very light (`1.1`).
description: Multiplies the player's movement speed while this saber is equipped.

name: ⚔️ Lock Bonus
overview:
Modifies the chance of winning a saber lock (blade bind).
> **Default:** 0

**⚙️ Mechanics**
*   **Value:** Integer.
*   **Effect:** A positive value increases your chance to push back an opponent in a blade lock.
tips: High strength characters (Vader, Desann) or those with high `MB_ATT_WOOKIE_STRENGTH` often have a bonus here.
description: Modifies the chance of winning a saber lock (blade bind).

name: ⭕ Saber Radius
overview:
The thickness of the lightsaber blade.
> **Default:** 3.0

**⚙️ Mechanics**
*   **Visual:** Makes the core thicker.
*   **Hitbox:** Slightly increases the hit detection cylinder? (Needs verification, often purely visual in JKA mods, but MBII may use it for collision).
tips: **Broadsabers:** Use values like **5.0** or **6.0** for a "heavy plasma" look.
**Rapiers:** Use **1.5** or **2.0** for a thin, needle-like blade.
description: The thickness of the lightsaber blade.

name: 🎵 Sound On
overview:
Sound played when the lightsaber ignites.
> **Example:** `"sound/weapons/saber/saberon.wav"`
tips: Make sure it's a mono `.wav` or `.mp3`.
Standard paths: `sound/weapons/saber/...`
description: Sound played when the lightsaber ignites.

name: 🚫 No Blade
overview:
Hides the energy blade completely.

**⚙️ Mechanics**
*   **1 (True):** Only the hilt model is visible.
*   **Usage:** Used when the "hilt" model actually includes the blade geometry (e.g. a physical sword model).
tips: If you are making a Vibroblade and the model includes the metal blade, set `noBlade 1`.
description: Hides the energy blade completely.

name: ⚔️ Saber Type
overview:
Defines the fundamental mechanic of the weapon.
> **Default:** SABER_SINGLE

**📋 Types**
*   `SABER_SINGLE`: Standard one-bladed hilt.
*   `SABER_STAFF`: Double-bladed (Maul style). Requires `numBlades 2`.
*   `SABER_BROAD`: ? (Specific broadsaber mechanics).
*   `SABER_CRYSTAL`: ? (Non-standard).
tips: Use `SABER_SINGLE` for Dual Sabers (you just equip two of them). `SABER_STAFF` is for a single hilt with two blades.
description: Defines the fundamental mechanic of the weapon.

name: 🛡️ Parry Bonus
overview:
Improves the ability to parry incoming attacks.
> **Default:** 0

**⚙️ Mechanics**
*   **Value:** Integer.
*   **Effect:** Reduces the BP (Block Point) cost when parrying a swing? Or increases the "stun" on the attacker? (MBII mechanics are complex here).
tips: Used for defensive duelists (Obi-Wan, Dooku).
description: Improves the ability to parry incoming attacks.

name: 💥 Damage Scale
overview:
Multiplier for saber damage.
> **Default:** 1.0

**⚙️ Mechanics**
*   **1.0:** Standard MBII saber damage.
*   **0.1:** Training saber (negligible damage).
*   **2.0:** One-hit kill on almost anything.
tips: Use **0.0** or extremely low values for "Knockback Sticks" or utility weapons that shouldn't kill.
description: Multiplier for saber damage.

name: ⚔️ Ready Animation
overview:
Overrides the idle stance animation.
> **Default:** Based on Saber Style.

**⚙️ Mechanics**
*   **Value:** Enum string (e.g., `BOTH_STAND1`).
*   **Visual:** Changes how the character holds the saber when not attacking.
tips: Use `BOTH_SABERDUAL_STANCE` for a cool dual-wielding pose even with a single saber.
description: Overrides the idle stance animation.

name: ⬇️ Custom Gravity
overview:
Sets the gravity affecting this specific vehicle.
> **Default:** 800 (Standard gravity).

**⚙️ Mechanics**
*   **Lower:** Vehicle floats/falls slowly.
*   **Higher:** Vehicle sticks to the ground.
tips: Use low gravity for "Hover" vehicles that shouldn't crash down hard after a jump.
description: Sets the gravity affecting this specific vehicle.

name: 🔄 Roll Limit
overview:
Maximum angle the vehicle can roll (tilt sideways).
> **Default:** ~45 degrees.

**⚙️ Mechanics**
*   **Value:** Degrees.
*   **Effect:** Limits how much the vehicle leans when turning.
tips: Set to **0** for stable platforms (Skiffs, Tanks) that shouldn't lean.
description: Maximum angle the vehicle can roll (tilt sideways).

name: 🔄 Banking Speed
overview:
How quickly the vehicle rolls/tilts into turns.

**⚙️ Mechanics**
*   **Visual:** Controls the leaning animation.
*   **Feel:** High banking makes the vehicle feel agile/light. Low feels rigid/heavy.
tips: Critical for the "Swoop Bike" feel.
description: How quickly the vehicle rolls/tilts into turns.

name: 🛑 Strafe Percentage
overview:
Multiplier for sideways movement speed (strafing) relative to forward speed.
> **Default:** 1.0 (Same speed)

**⚙️ Mechanics**
*   **0.5:** Strafing is half as fast as moving forward.
*   **0.0:** Cannot strafe (Tank/Rail shooter style).
tips: Lower this for heavy vehicles like AT-STs to make them feel cumbersome.
description: Multiplier for sideways movement speed (strafing) relative to forward speed.

name: 🛡️ Armor (Vehicle)
overview:
Hull integrity of the vehicle.

**⚙️ Mechanics**
*   **Health:** When this hits 0, the vehicle explodes.
*   **Resistance:** Vehicles generally resist small arms fire better than players.
tips: **Speeder Bike:** ~200-400.
description: Hull integrity of the vehicle.

name: 🚀 Acceleration
overview:
How quickly the vehicle reaches top speed.

**⚙️ Mechanics**
*   **Higher:** Snappy, responsive takeoff.
*   **Lower:** Heavy, sluggish takeoff.
tips: Tanks should have low accel. Speeder bikes high.
description: How quickly the vehicle reaches top speed.

name: 🖱️ Mouse Yaw
overview:
Sensitivity of turning left/right with the mouse.
> **Default:** 0.003 (approx)

**⚙️ Mechanics**
*   **Higher:** Turns faster/snappier.
*   **Lower:** Turns slower/heavier.
tips: Crucial for balancing turret turn rates.
description: Sensitivity of turning left/right with the mouse.

name: 🛡️ Shields (Vehicle)
overview:
Regenerating energy barrier.

**⚙️ Mechanics**
*   **Regen:** Regenerates after a delay without taking damage.
*   **Protection:** Absorbs damage before Armor.
tips: Not all vehicles have shields. TIE Fighters do not (Canon). X-Wings do.
description: Regenerating energy barrier.

name: 🏎️ Top Speed
overview:
Maximum forward velocity of the vehicle.
> **Default:** Varies (Speeder Bike ~800+)

**⚙️ Mechanics**
*   **Units:** Game Units per Second.
*   **Comparison:** Player run speed is ~250. 500 is fast. 1000 is extremely fast.
tips: Too fast = Uncontrollable on small maps.
description: Maximum forward velocity of the vehicle.

name: 📦 Supply
overview:
A generic supply counter.
> **Default Regen:** 6 / 1000ms

**⚙️ Mechanics**
*   **Usage:** Can be used for custom ability drain.
tips: Flexible resource for custom classes.
description: A generic supply counter.

name: ⚡ Energy
overview:
Generic energy pool for abilities.
> **Color:** 🟡 Dark Yellow
> **Default Regen:** 1 / 200ms

**⚙️ Mechanics**
*   **Regen:** Regenerates even while in the air.
*   **Usage:** Elite Trooper, Hero, Commander abilities.
tips: Reliable, steady resource for non-Force users.
description: Generic energy pool for abilities.

name: ⛽ Fuel
overview:
Propellant for jetpacks and flamethrowers.
> **Color:** 🟡 Yellow
> **Default Regen:** level / 1000ms

**⚙️ Mechanics**
*   **Usage:** Flying, Flamethrower, Wrist Laser.
*   **Regen:** Regenerates slowly when grounded.
tips: Standard for Mandalorians.
description: Propellant for jetpacks and flamethrowers.

name: 😡 Rage / Fury
overview:
Adrenaline and anger.
> **Color:** 🔴 Red
> **Default Regen:** 1 / 1000ms

**⚙️ Mechanics**
*   **Build:** Builds up by **dealing damage** (if class has `MB_ATT_WOOKIEE_FURY`).
*   **Usage:** Activating Wookiee Fury.
tips: Used by Wookiees to trigger their berserk state.
description: Adrenaline and anger.

name: 🧙 Force Points
overview:
The mystic energy field.
> **Color:** 🔵 Light Blue
> **Default Regen:** 1 / 150ms

**⚙️ Mechanics**
*   **Regen:** Pauses regeneration while in the air (unless `MB_ATT_INAIR_FORCE_REGEN` is active).
*   **Sprint:** Does NOT drain Force (unlike Stamina).
*   **Usage:** Jumping, Powers, Blocking (BP is separate but related).
tips: Standard for Jedi/Sith.
description: The mystic energy field.

name: 🔋 Battery
overview:
Standard droid power source.
> **Color:** 🟢 Green
> **Default Regen:** 3 / 1000ms

**⚙️ Mechanics**
*   **MB_CLASS_SBD:** Drains on movement, fire, and damage absorption. Low battery reduces movement speed, fire rate, and damage reduction.
*   **Other Classes:** Only affects damage reduction rules (if applicable).
tips: The lifeblood of an SBD. Manage it or become a sitting duck.
description: Standard droid power source.

name: 🛡️ Droideka Shield
overview:
Droideka shield generator pool.
> **Default:** Droideka

**⚙️ Mechanics**
*   **Drain:** Depleted by incoming damage when Shield is active.
*   **Regen:** Only regenerates when Shield is OFF (Ball mode usually).
tips: Keep an eye on this bar. When it hits 0, your hull takes damage.
description: Droideka shield generator pool.

name: 🏃 Stamina
overview:
Physical endurance.
> **Color:** 🔵 Blue
> **Default Regen:** (level*2) + 3 / 1000ms

**⚙️ Mechanics**
*   **Usage:** Sprinting, Wall-running, Acrobatics, Dodge.
*   **Usage:** Clone/ARC Trooper, Hero.
tips: Regenerates quickly when walking/standing.
description: Physical endurance.
